title: 21:23 ГўВЂВ” June 30, 2021
body_text:
21:23 ГўВЂВ” June 30, 2021
PaymentStream AFT Update ГўВЂВ“ Scheduled Notifications for Pending Task Emails
A new feature is available on
PaymentStream
TM
AFT for Data Entry Automatic Release originators. Your financial institution can request scheduled notifications for pending task emails by submitting a ticket in ServiceNow. You can also offer this option to your Data Entry Automatic Release business originators and submit any requests to Central 1 on their behalf. This feature provides three pending task email notifications to approvers daily instead of one email per action.
We also revised images in all three user guides for business members to reflect system updates. Please see details in the table below.
AFT Volume
Originating AFT via
PaymentStream
AFT Part
Section 1.4, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We added that Data Entry Automatic Release originators can contact Central 1 Support to request scheduled email notifications for pending tasks.
Section 12.1, Overview of Approval of Tasks/Transactions
We added a subsection on scheduled email notifications for pending tasks.
